request: share countrywise details of all the products

dashboard_layout.title: Top Countries by Total Product Sales Value
Top Products by Sales Value (Per Country)

sql_queries.title: Product Sales Details by Country
sql_queries.description: Detailed breakdown of each product's sales performance (quantity and revenue) in every country it was shipped to.
sql_queries.sql:
SELECT
  P.ProductName,
  O.ShipCountry,
  SUM(OD.Quantity) AS TotalQuantitySold,
  SUM(OD.UnitPrice * OD.Quantity * (1 - OD.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue
FROM "Order Details" AS OD
JOIN Products AS P
  ON OD.ProductID = P.ProductID
JOIN Orders AS O
  ON OD.OrderID = O.OrderID
GROUP BY
  P.ProductName,
  O.ShipCountry
ORDER BY
  O.ShipCountry,
  P.ProductName;

sql_queries.title: Top Countries by Total Product Sales Value
sql_queries.description: Bar chart showing countries ranked by their total sales value across all products.
sql_queries.sql:
SELECT
  O.ShipCountry,
  SUM(OD.UnitPrice * OD.Quantity * (1 - OD.Discount)) AS TotalSalesValue
FROM "Order Details" AS OD
JOIN Orders AS O
  ON OD.OrderID = O.OrderID
GROUP BY
  O.ShipCountry
ORDER BY
  TotalSalesValue DESC;

sql_queries.title: Top Products by Sales Value (Per Country)
sql_queries.description: Bar chart displaying the top-selling products based on sales value, with an option to filter by country.
sql_queries.sql:
SELECT
  P.ProductName,
  O.ShipCountry,
  SUM(OD.UnitPrice * OD.Quantity * (1 - OD.Discount)) AS TotalSalesValue
FROM "Order Details" AS OD
JOIN Products AS P
  ON OD.ProductID = P.ProductID
JOIN Orders AS O
  ON OD.OrderID = O.OrderID
GROUP BY
  P.ProductName,
  O.ShipCountry
ORDER BY
  O.ShipCountry,
  TotalSalesValue DESC;

sql_queries.title: Country Selector
sql_queries.description: Allows users to filter the dashboard data by specific shipping countries.
sql_queries.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  ShipCountry
FROM Orders
ORDER BY
  ShipCountry;

sql_queries.title: Product Category Selector
sql_queries.description: Allows users to filter the dashboard data by product categories.
sql_queries.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  CategoryName
FROM Categories
ORDER BY
  CategoryName;
